content.body:
Removes delegation-mandatory, think-before-execute, know-what-you-dont-know,
peer-review-automatic from coreConstraints(). Removes task-intake from
coreSkills(). Simplifies session-wrap-up (removes profile/pipeline refs).
Strips orchestration model language from defaultIdentity().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(kb): remove retired constraints/skills from embedded core KB
